---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to do that you can't today?

Describe the workflow, not the implementation. ("I want to set the same footer on every page" rather than "we need a master template system" — let us figure out the implementation.)

## Why is this important?

What does it unblock? Who benefits? If you can compare to how Dreamweaver, BBEdit, Pinegrow, or another editor handles it, that's helpful context.

## Has it been considered already?

Check `GRAPESTRAP_BUILD_PLAN_v4.md` and the issue tracker first. If it's already on the v0.x roadmap, link the existing item rather than opening a duplicate.

## Are you willing to help?

Implementing? Testing? Translating? Writing docs? All welcomed.
